name: Fluffy Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter and chocolate in a bowl.
2. Set the bowl over hot water, stirring until melted.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in the sugar until dissolved.
5. Gradually stir in the salt and cream.
6. Return to the hot water bath and stir until thoroughly blended.
7. Remove from heat.
8. Stir in the vanilla and allow to cool completely.
9. Gently fold in the whipping cream.
10. Serve slightly chilled.
